overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 featuring a character with blue hair walking through Night City at dusk. The scene transitions from a covered walkway beneath an elevated highway bathed in intense pink neon lighting to an open area with views of the distant skyline and palm trees. The atmosphere is distinctly cyberpunk with high-contrast neon colors, digital billboards, and futuristic vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban walkway under elevated highway with intense pink neon lighting

events.description: pedestrian with sunglasses and patterned jacket passes close by on the right, temporarily blocking the view

agents.ego_description: character with blue hair and purple jacket walking steadily along the sidewalk under the neon-lit highway structure

notable_agents.action: passing by closely on the right wearing sunglasses and a patterned jacket

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass with pink neon strip lighting running along its underside
intense magenta pink neon lights illuminating the walkway from above
large illuminated advertisement screen visible on building facade across the street
futuristic cars with headlights on driving along the multi-lane street
wide paved pedestrian walkway with reflective wet surface

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a blue-haired character walking beneath a massive elevated highway bathed in intense pink neon light. The walkway is moderately crowded with pedestrians, and futuristic vehicles drive along the street to the right. A pedestrian wearing sunglasses passes close by on the right side around the 7-second mark.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered underpass with commercial digital billboards and support pillars

events.description: pink neon lighting fades as character moves deeper under the overpass into darker artificial lighting
large digital billboard on left becomes prominent as the walkway narrows

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk forward through the darker underpass section, maintaining steady pace

entered.detail: tall building facade covered with large illuminated digital advertisement screens displaying graphics
thick cylindrical support columns for the elevated highway structure
dark concrete underside of the highway completely blocking sky view

segments.scene_description: The character moves deeper into the covered underpass where the pink neon gives way to darker artificial lighting. Large digital billboards dominate the left side of the walkway while thick concrete support pillars line the right. The space feels more enclosed as the sky disappears from view, replaced by the dark concrete ceiling of the underpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition zone from covered walkway to open urban street with distant skyline view

events.description: exiting the covered underpass, view opens to reveal distant city skyline and palm trees silhouetted against the sky
ambient lighting shifts from artificial to natural dusk as open sky becomes visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking toward the open area ahead, approaching other pedestrians visible in the distance

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking ahead in the same direction toward the open street

entered.detail: tall palm trees silhouetted against the dusk sky visible in the distance
futuristic skyscrapers and high-rise buildings forming the city horizon
dusk sky with fading natural light visible at the end of the underpass tunnel

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the end of the covered walkway where the space opens up to reveal a view of the distant city skyline and palm trees against the dusk sky. The elevated highway structure shifts to the left as the camera emerges from the underpass, and the lighting transitions from artificial to natural dusk. Other pedestrians are visible ahead walking toward the open urban area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a neon-drenched urban underpass into an open city plaza at dusk. It begins by following a blue-haired character beneath a massive elevated highway bathed in intense pink neon light, passing pedestrians and futuristic vehicles. As the character moves deeper into the covered walkway, the vibrant pink glow gives way to darker artificial lighting and a sense of enclosure, with large digital billboards and thick concrete pillars dominating the view. The scene then opens up as the character reaches the end of the underpass, where the concrete ceiling disappears to reveal a distant city skyline and palm trees. Finally, the lighting transitions from artificial neon to the natural tones of dusk as the camera emerges from the highway structure into the open urban area.
